model performance

runtime: claude-code

ModelRepsPassLatencyCost
Opus 4.8 ✓ 1292% [78–98%]36s1.0×proven
Sonnet 5 —not run—≈0.2×▸ run 4

basis · what it was built from

Job
Turn an approved design.md into a shippable SKILL.md — without inventing scope.
Out of scope
Writing design.md; touching research/ or evals/.
Fit criterion
Keeps every design.md constraint; declines when design.md is empty.

research corpus

  • design.md — the reasoning — why it's shaped this way
  • failure hypotheses ×5 — the known ways drafting goes wrong
  • SKILL.md conventions — prior art the draft is held to
  • proof spec — the fixture each hypothesis must pass

family

— origin · (not forked from anything)

└─ william-draft-skill-md-haiku · fork · cheaper model · awaiting first run

growth & improvement · ways to win more

Make it cheaper

  • Split-test on Haiku 4.5fork & run ▸

    Head-to-head vs Opus. ~12× cheaper.

  • Token dietopen ▸

    Trim the reference material — re-measure.

  • Drop the big modelcompare ▸

    If Sonnet clears the bar, stop paying for Opus.

Prove it deeper

  • Close 3 gapsauthor ▸

    RE-1, OUT-1, OUT-2 have no fixture.

  • Clear below-smokequeue ▸

    Add reps to tighten the interval.

  • Add an adversarial caseadd ▸

    Raise the floor on what burned you.

Innovate

  • Fork upwardfork ▸

    Base for a gnarlier drafting skill.

  • Cash in a new modeltest ▸

    Exploit the next drop, don't just survive it.

  • Specialize itfork ▸

    A variant for a domain or customer.

Every play ends the same way: change it, re-run the fixtures, keep the receipt. Win without breaking it.

every figure pinned to a version & model
